text:
BOTTOM LINE — Risk-on, small caps crushed it, Dow soared 1000+. Small caps led by 0.85pp amid Dow +1.79%, S&P +1.20%, Nasdaq +1.52%; Boeing +4.28%, housing flows fueled rotation from megacaps; neutral Fear & Greed 48 signals broadening without euphoria.

INDICES — VIX 17.5 down vs 20d MA 23.4. DIA +1.77%, IWM +2.16%, SPY +1.21%, QQQ +1.31%. Small > large by 0.85pp. DIA +1.77% most notable, SLV +3.35% cross-asset star.

VOLUME — Elevated: DIA 1.6x, IWM 1.0x, XRT 1.8x, IBIT 1.8x gaining attention. SPY vol_ratio implicit in avg 0.87x indices, QQQ similar; declining IJR 0.7x, GLD 0.7x ignored. Vol up + price up in DIA/IWM = accumulation, IJR vol down + price up = low-conviction.

SECTORS — XLY Discretionary +2.37%, XLI Industrials +1.87%, XLK Technology +1.53%, XLRE Real Estate +1.53%, XLV Healthcare +1.49%, XLP Staples +1.26%, XLF Financials +0.77%, XLB Materials +0.25%, XLC Comms +0.23%, XLU Utilities -0.41%, XLE Energy -2.76%. Top 2 Industries XRT +2.90%, IBIT +2.83%; bottom 2 MSOS -0.25%, KWEB +1.16%.

THE 7s — Housing 7 +3.35% (DHI strongest +0.99%, VRT weakest +3.99%), Buildout 7 +2.58%, Fab 7 +2.36%, Semi 7 +1.85%. MSOS -0.25% (weakest basket), KWEB +1.16%, SOCL +1.66%, GLD +1.33%.

FED & LIQUIDITY — Next FOMC Apr 29, CME hold 100%. Hawk 6 (Cook,Hammack,Kashkari,Logan,Barkin,Goolsbee), neutral 5 (Powell,Williams,Barr,Jefferson,Paulson), dove 4 (Bowman,Miran,Waller,Daly). USD liquidity 9/100 calm, SOFR dispersion 9th percentile most-stressed.

POSITIONING — VIX 17.5 below 20d MA 23.4 = complacency. VXN 21.6 below 26.5, RVX 0.0 below 0.0, VVIX 95.1 below 113.3. MOVE 65.9 below 87.6 eases bond vol stress.

CROSS-ASSET — SLV +3.35% outpaces GLD +1.33% despite risk-on, silver catching housing/buildout flows. Dow +1.79% via Boeing +4.28% industrials rotation.

SIGNALS — Fear & Greed 48 neutral. Top 3 movers: RCL +7.34% consumer, PHM +5.03% housing, Boeing +4.28% industrials. 20d momentum: Buildout 7 +12.73% best sector, Fab 7 +12.64% best basket; RSP +5.54% worst sector.

WATCH — DHI +0.99%, Q2 EPS Apr 21. RCL +7.34%, vol spike accumulation. MRVL +3.36%, Fab 7 divergence near gamma flip.
